headline: Blue Buffalo Celebrates America's 1750th Birthday (in Dog Years!) with the Dog-Friendliest Fireworks Show and Ways to Safely Include Your Pets in the Festivities
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, June 22, 2026--As communities across the country gear up for larger-than-usual festivities to celebrate America’s momentous 250th birthday (that’s its 1750th in dog years!), Blue Buffalo is launching a collection of dog-first activities, deals and resources to help pets stay calm during the noise and excitement of the holiday, including a first-of-its-kind dog-friendly fireworks experience.

headline: General Mills: Dividend In Danger Of Getting Milled -- Sell
summary: General Mills faces a potential dividend cut as organic sales decline and net debt climbs to $13B. Find out why GIS stock is a sell.
